name: Ad Creative Validator
description: Validate, resize, and optimize advertising creative assets across 50+ platforms using Cloudinary AI generative fill

functionDeclarations.name: validate_creative_asset
functionDeclarations.description: Validate an advertising creative asset against 50+ platform specs (Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, YouTube, DV360, TTD, CTV). Returns compatible channels, off-size channels needing resize, and incompatible channels.

functionDeclarations.name: resize_for_ad_platform
functionDeclarations.description: Generate a Cloudinary transformation URL to resize an asset for a specific advertising platform. Uses AI generative fill (b_gen_fill) for extreme aspect ratio changes and smart crop (c_fill,g_auto) for similar ratios.

publicId.description: Cloudinary public_id of the source asset

channel.description: Target channel name (e.g. 'GDN Medium Rectangle', 'Facebook Stories', 'Instagram Feed Portrait')

functionDeclarations.name: batch_resize_ad_package
functionDeclarations.description: Generate Cloudinary transformation URLs for an entire platform package at once. Available packages: GDN Essential (8 sizes), Meta Complete (6 placements), TTD Complete, DV360 Complete, Universal Display (15 IAB sizes).

publicId.description: Cloudinary public_id of the source asset

functionDeclarations.name: get_ad_platform_specs
functionDeclarations.description: Get exact specifications for any advertising platform or channel. Returns dimensions, aspect ratios, file size limits, and duration constraints. Can query by channel name or category (social, gdn, ttd, dv360, ctv).

channel.description: Channel name (e.g. 'Facebook Feed Square') or category (e.g. 'gdn', 'social', 'ttd')

functionDeclarations.name: generate_cloudinary_transform_url
functionDeclarations.description: Generate a custom Cloudinary transformation URL with specific parameters. Use for transforms not covered by resize_for_ad_platform.

gravity.description: Gravity: auto, auto:faces, center, north, south, etc.

background.description: Background: gen_fill, blurred, auto, or hex color

format.description: Output format: auto, jpg, png, webp

quality.description: Quality: auto, auto:best, auto:good, auto:eco, or 1-100
